def: Still as a stock, or fixed post; perfectly still.His whole work stands stock-still. Sterne.

Any one of several species of honey eaters belonging toAnthochæra and allied genera of the family Meliphagidæ. These birdsusually have a large and conspicuous wattle of naked skin hangingdown below each ear. They are natives of Australia and adjacentislands.
To harden. [Obs.]It will embrawn and iron-crust his flesh. Nash.
To excite; to tease, or worry; to harry. [Obs.] Locke.

In Roman dwellings, a cistern or tank, set in the atrium orperistyle to recieve the water from the roof, by means of thecompluvium; generally made ornamental with flowers and works of artaround its birm.
Of or pertaining to the omosternum.
